title: Science Tutor
description:
About Indigo Education Group

Indigo Education Group is a premier tuition provider renowned for its unique pedagogy and robust curriculum, which have helped an impressive number of students achieve distinctions in national examinations (GCE A-Level, GCE O-Level) and gain admissions to elite universities worldwide.


We specialise in tuition for Junior College (JC), Secondary Integrated Programme (IP) and Secondary Express (O-Level) students, offering subjects such as English/General Paper (GP), Chemistry, Economics, Math and Lower Secondary Science. Founded in 2011, we now have several thousand students across six centres in Singapore and more than fifty full-time employees. Indigo Chemistry & Science Faculty


After the merger and acquisition by Indigo Education Group, Making Sense Chemistry (The nation’s leading Chemistry tuition centre) has been rebranded as Indigo Chemistry and Science. A career with us offers exciting opportunities at one of the most respected Chemistry & Science education centres in Singapore. We are often associated as the cream of the crops, specializing in our expertise subject and channel all our resources towards curating materials of the highest quality.


Being an Educator at Indigo Chemistry & Science

We are a tight-knit team of dynamic and driven individuals with a shared vision of delivering great value to our students, as well as ensuring that Indigo is a fun, inclusive, challenging place to work and develop a rewarding career


You will be working with a team who works with pride, people who inspire, and in an institutionalised setup with career progression opportunities and job satisfaction.


We welcome teachers of different experience levels - Junior tutors will receive coaching and mentoring by senior tutors to ensure that you are well-trained in our curriculum and pedagogy, while the senior teacher can adopt a more nurturing role and strategic planning.


We are seeking dynamic and engaging Chemistry and science tutors to join our academic team. If you are passionate about education and possess a nurturing mindset, let’s discuss to see if we are a good fit for each other. Experience is not always a must because the right mindset is what we are after.


Responsibilities:

A teaching associate’s main responsibility is to deliver lessons in a dynamic and engaging manner. Other requirements will include

  • Assist in the planning and development of lesson resources and materials
  • Establish and maintain good rapport with students and parents
  • Provide timely formative and summative feedback to students to help them realise their potential

SUBJECTS AND LEVELS

  • Lower Secondary – Science
  • Upper Secondary – Chemistry, Physics, Biology
  • A level – Chemistry, Physics, Biology

Requirements:

  • Degree in teaching subject applied for, or in a related field
  • A passion to teach and serve students
  • Dynamic and confident, with an approachable disposition
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Strong team player who can work well with others
  • Able to work on weekends
  • Candidates with prior teaching experience are preferred

postedCompany.description:
Established since 2011, Indigo Education Group is renowned for hardcore quality JC, IP and Express Secondary O and A Level tuition. Our educators are all Dynamic and Passionate; each serving with Distinction, to ensure that we give parents and students a peace of mind.


For more than 10 years, Indigo O and A Level cohorts have surpassed average National Distinction rates - leading with over 80% distinction rates across core Secondary and JC level subjects:

English, Science, General Paper, Mathematics, Economics (H1 and H2), Chemistry (H1 and H2), Biology, Physics, Geography


Not your typical sit-and-receive tuition centre, Indigo O and A Level students are taught, guided, and mentored to achieve and sustain stellar results through robust curriculum and renowned pedagogy designed by teachers and subject specialists from top schools with combined teaching experience of more than 20 years. Our in-house student resources and teaching materials undergo rigorous audits to be academically-aligned with MOE syllabus, combine advanced learning methodologies to ensure Secondary and JC students reach their full potential beyond their current level.


Throughout the year, Indigo Education Group takes pride in delivering special programmes such as master classes, exam crash courses, and seminars with prominent industry leaders to cater to the Secondary or JC students’ learning needs, academic requirements, as well as career interests. Yearly, not only do we ensure more than 2000 Secondary IP, Express, and JC students in Singapore are well prepared for school examinations and the National O and A-levels, Indigo is highly committed to helping A Level students gain admission to elite universities worldwide.


Going above and beyond traditional teaching, our objective is to deliver student-centric, top quality, and performance-oriented tuition for every student to go further in their learning. Every student can graduate from Secondary School or Junior College a better person, well-equipped with strong academic results as well as soft skills and 21st-century competencies needed to succeed in life well beyond school.
postedCompany.name: MAKING SENSE TUITION CENTRE PTE. LTD.
